item.title:

What an afternoon in store at the European Darts Grand Prix, including a clash
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min DAY TWO!
What an afternoon in store at the European Darts Grand Prix, including a clash between reigning champion Gary Anderson and German star Niko Springer!
1300 CEST | 1200 BST
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 11 1 mil
